title: Fire Force: Adolla Craft
description: This Fire Force mod is based on the official anime/manga; Fire Force
body:
Adolla Craft brings the world of the hottest new-gen anime/manga Fire Force into Minecraft.

Become a pyrokinetic, wield Second, Third, and Fourth Generation abilities, create your own Company, and battle NPCs or PVP using our fully realized power system which is enhanced with extraordinary photon-based visual effects.

The mod is actively expanding and will soon introduce nearly every Ignition Ability seen in the anime and manga, along with new weapons, bosses, and a full  story mode to immerse you deeper into the world of Adolla.


Note: This mod requires Photon and Attribute Fix

 

 

 

Q: How do I get abilities?
A: Either spawn with a randomizer or kill Whiteclad-Henchmen to get the Adolla Bug item. After using the bug on yourself, you have a chance of becoming a pyrokinetic or dying leaving an Infernal in your place

Q: How do I level up?
A: Killings mobs or finding Xp Bundles

Q: Why can't I see the VFX
A: Usually it's problems with photon which unfortunetly I can't fix on the mod side.

Q: Where can I see the progress of the Mod???
A: On our the official Fire Force: Adolla Craft Trello, There youll see everything planned and currently added.

Q: Where is the official server?
A: We are currently making one!

 

Commands

  • /fireforce
  • /fireforceadmin 

Gamerules and Playerules

  • /gamerule fireforceblockdestruction
  • /fireforce playerRule impactframes
  • /fireforce playerRule friendlyfire

 

  • DarknessDxD (Coder, Artist, VFX)
  • Star_Fan (Main Artist)
  • Yamikaze (Artist)

 

 

 

If you want to become a beta tester for not only the this mod but for ALL my mods and servers, feel free to subscribe to my patreon!

Don't wanna subsribe? Thats ok, join the community as a FREE member still having acess to some patreon exclusives.
